chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Criminal Misc. Application No. 1211 of 2024 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of Main Case. 3. For hearing of M.A No.16423/2024. 30.01.2025 Mr. Mumtaz Ali Shah, Assistant Prosecutor General, Sindh. -x-x-x-x-x- Syed Shafqat Hussain, Advocate holds brief on behalf of Mr. Amir Zaheer, learned counsel for the applicant. Learned Assistant P.G, Sindh submits that main case bearing Direct Complaint No.932 of 2023 has been disposed of by way of judgment dated 18.12.2024 passed by learned Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate-II, Karachi (East). As the learned Assistant P.G, Sindh relies upon a CFMS diary and submits a copy of the same, which is reproduced as under;_ “Case called. Today matter is fixed for final arguments on behalf of complainant. Accused Naseem and accused Danish are present on bail other accused Kashif called absent. Advocate for the accused persons is present and filed application for condonation of accused Kashif. Order passed on it. ADPP for the State and Advocate for the complainant are present. Arguments heard for the advocate for complainant. Judgement passed and announced in open Court, whereby all accused are acquitted U/s 245 (i) Cr. PC, they are present on bail, their bail bond stands cancelled and sureties discharged.” In view of above, once the trial has been finalized, therefore, pendency of such litigation is no more required. Accordingly, instant Criminal Misc. Application is hereby disposed of. JUDGE Zulfiqar/P.A
